mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t2.task_code, t4.sample_name, t1.count_price, t1.request_date FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t1.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id left join test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 on t1.id = t5.entrust_id and t4.id = t5.sample_id where t2.task_code is not null and t5.state = 3
